purpose: Eligibility calibration unrelated to Project FAR candidates or CRE-003 benchmark content.
passing_rule: All three cases must match the frozen expected source and translation judgments. Mechanism labels may include any listed correct label.

cases.source_a: A cabinet stores a red card in drawer 1.
cases.source_b: A cabinet stores a blue card in drawer 1.

cases.source_a: The objective is to reach room 4.
cases.source_b: The objective is to avoid room 4.

cases.source_a: Move is permitted only after a key is found.
cases.source_b: Move is permitted without a key.
